title: Test: Infrastructure-First Pipeline Verification

files.content:
# Infrastructure-First Test

## Verification Points:
- ✅ PU to PR conversion working
- ✅ GitHub API integration functional
- ✅ CI/CD workflows configured
- ✅ Auto-merge pipeline active

**System:** CoreLink Foundation
**Mode:** Infrastructure-First

body:
🤖 **Autonomous System Test**

This PR verifies the Infrastructure-First pipeline is working:

1. PU was converted to PR automatically
2. GitHub API integration is functional
3. CI/CD will validate the changes
4. Auto-merge will complete the cycle

If you see this PR, the autonomous development pipeline is operational!
